title: Data-matching letters
description: Where we find a difference in details on your tax return and data reported to us, we'll send you a letter.
keywords: information matching, data matching, data-matching, discrepancy,  compliance, letter, schedule,  complaince program, tax return

child_links.title: Types of letters
child_links.description: We issue data-matching letters when we find a difference between the details you report and data that is reported to us.

child_links.title: Amended assessment from data-matching
child_links.description: How we notify you we have made an amendment or adjustment to your tax return and, what you can do if you disagree.
